question:
Vertical Alignment (VA) display technology can be characterized by: (Select 3 answers)

High contrast ratios
Low color quality
Good viewing angles
Low contrast ratios
Good color quality
Low viewing angles
canonical_answer:
High contrast ratios

Good viewing angles

Good color quality
